header: Three reasons teams switch to Desiderio

items.tab_content: Fifteen shadcn presets repaint your whole site at runtime — per-page presets give any subtree its own look, and dark mode with WCAG 2.2-checked contrast is built into every preset. A redesign in a click.
PHPStan at level max, PHPUnit across every supported PHP version, and an automated template audit with zero tolerance for inline styles or hardcoded colors. Quality you can verify, not just believe.
All 244 elements are TYPO3 Content Blocks with real backend previews, sorted into ten wizard groups. One seeder command fills the styleguide with realistic content — editors never face a blank page.
